summary: Verified two Admin Panel UI bug fixes: 1) Manager Details Modal responsive fix - statistics cards now display in 2x2 grid on mobile (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4). 2) Jackpot Management Panel fix - user dropdown is populated with 7 users and amount input is functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render
Shows 'Gewonnen: Gebote (€NaN)' - minor display issue when last_won_amount is undefined

bug_1_manager_modal_responsive.description: Manager Details Modal cut off on mobile devices

verification.desktop_view: PASS - 4 statistics cards displayed in a row
verification.mobile_view: PASS - 2 statistics cards per row (2x2 grid)

bug_2_jackpot_panel.description: Jackpot Management Panel - user dropdown and amount input broken

jackpot_tab_features.jackpot_adjustment: PASS - Input field and Setzen button working

critical_code_review_comments: Manager Modal responsive fix correctly implemented with grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4
Jackpot tab correctly fetches users when activeTab === 'jackpot' (line 350-352 in Admin.js)
Minor: Last Winner section shows €NaN when last_won_amount is undefined - cosmetic issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel UI bugs verified as fixed: 1) Manager Details Modal now responsive on mobile with 2x2 grid layout for statistics cards. 2) Jackpot Management Panel working - user dropdown populated with 7 users, amount input functional. Jackpot tab is at the bottom of the sidebar (scroll down to find it). Minor cosmetic issue: Last Winner section shows €NaN when last_won_amount is undefined.
